calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-21-2018 Continued To Aug-28-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Habib Bentaleb for and with Andrew Beil.
Mr. and Mrs. Mau also present.

The Court stated that notice was not given on the Judicial Council form and advised Counsel that he needs to look over the Probate procedures, stated that it has a waiver of notice from the Franchise Tax Board ('FTB"), but it does not waive their claim and that the FTB still has a couple of weeks to file their claim. Mr. Habib stated that he filed something last week that acknowledges a zero balance (copy provided). The Court read the language in the letter and stated that it does not waive the FTB's right to file a claim if they find something. Mr. Habib stated that he would be happy to revise the order to keep a reserve in the event a claim is filed. The Court informed Mr. Habib that the amended order also needs to include a description of the property. The Petition for Final Distribution is continued to August 28, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and will be deemed under submission as of that date. Mr. Habib is also to file a statement that is effective August 28, 2018 indicating that no claim has come in from the FTB.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Chu. Not reported.
